description: Network infrastructure health for SNMP-monitored devices (switches, firewalls, access points, UPS). Shows device status, interface health, traffic rates, and error metrics per site.

options.content: Network device monitoring via SNMP. Interface status, traffic utilization, error rates, and device inventory. Filter by device to see individual switch/firewall interfaces.

panels.description: Total SNMP-monitored devices responding across selected sites.
panels.title: Devices Monitored

panels.description: SNMP devices not responding to polls.
panels.title: Devices Down

panels.description: Interfaces administratively enabled but operationally down.
panels.title: Interfaces Down

panels.description: Interfaces exceeding 80% utilization in either direction.
panels.title: High Utilization

panels.description: Active SNMP alerts for the selected sites.

targets.expr: count(ALERTS{alertstate="firing", category="network", datacenter=~"$datacenter", environment=~"$environment"}) or vector(0)

panels.title: Active Alerts

panels.description: All SNMP-monitored devices with current status, uptime, and device metadata.
panels.title: Device Inventory

panels.description: Interfaces with admin-up / oper-down state (link failures).
panels.title: Interface Status Table

panels.description: Aggregate inbound traffic rate per device.
panels.title: Inbound Traffic by Device

panels.description: Aggregate outbound traffic rate per device.
panels.title: Outbound Traffic by Device

panels.description: Top 10 interfaces by inbound utilization percentage.
panels.title: Top 10 Inbound Utilization

panels.description: Top 10 interfaces by outbound utilization percentage.
panels.title: Top 10 Outbound Utilization

panels.description: Interface error rates across all devices. Non-zero sustained errors indicate physical layer issues.
panels.title: Interface Errors (Top 10)

panels.description: Interface discard rates. Discards indicate buffer overflows or QoS policy drops.
panels.title: Interface Discards (Top 10)

panels.description: Recent SNMP trap events received from network devices via snmptrapd. Shows source device, trap type, and raw trap data.
panels.title: SNMP Trap Log

panels.description: SNMP trap volume over time by trap type. Spikes may indicate flapping interfaces or device instability.
panels.title: Trap Volume by Type

title: Network Infrastructure
